briefs.title: 旅遊素材包 — 沖繩海島
briefs.meta: 範例 · 6 B-roll + 1 Flow + 3 內容 + 2 字卡
briefs.summary: 沖繩海島主題的 B-roll、Flow 主打片與字卡文案，拿去 Veo / Flow / Imagen 生成。

items.text: Slow aerial push-in over turquoise shallow water meeting white sand, midday sun, gentle waves, cinematic, no on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.
Low-angle static shot of clear water lapping over smooth coral rocks, golden hour, soft bokeh, no text, no logos.
Handheld walking POV along an empty beach path with palm shadows, warm morning light, natural motion, no text.
Underwater tracking shot following light rays through clear tropical water, small fish, calm, no text, no logos.
Drone orbit around a small rocky islet surrounded by gradients of blue, clear sky, cinematic, no text.
Close-up of sea foam sliding back over wet sand in slow motion, soft daylight, seamless, no text, no logos.

A 15-20s cinematic hero clip: sunrise over an Okinawa beach, camera slowly rising from the water surface to reveal the horizon, warm-to-cool light shift, gentle waves, unhurried pacing, film grain, no on-screen text.
沖繩的海之所以那麼藍，是因為海底細白珊瑚砂反射陽光——水越淺、顏色越夢幻。
想拍到最透的海，選上午 9–11 點、退潮前後，光線直射水最清。
把腳步放慢，海島不是用來趕行程的，是用來發呆的。
把整片藍留給自己｜沖繩・慢島指南 (background: minimal turquoise ocean gradient, soft light, lots of negative space)
上午的海最誠實｜拍海攻略 (background: clear shallow water texture from above, bright, clean)

briefs.title: 夏日感官饗宴：極致美食特寫視覺包
briefs.meta: Gemini R&D · 6 B-roll + 1 Flow + 3 內容 + 2 字卡
briefs.summary: 本素材包專為美食與旅遊社群短影音設計，結合高飽和度、極致細節的特寫鏡頭與質感文案，用視覺與文字瞬間喚醒觀眾的食慾。

items.text: Extreme macro shot of a golden-brown, crispy skin of a roast duck being sliced, juices glistening under warm, dramatic spotlight. Slow tracking movement following the knife. Evening restaurant ambiance, cozy and luxurious. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

Ultra close-up of fresh, vibrant red strawberry-matcha shaved ice as condensed milk slowly drizzles down the side, creating beautiful patterns. Soft morning natural light, bright and refreshing mood. Slow tilt-up camera movement. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

Macro close-up of a perfectly cooked medium-rare wagyu steak being cut open, revealing a tender, pink center with steam gently rising. Low-angle panning shot, moody dark-themed background with warm ambient light. Evening steakhouse atmosphere. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

Extreme close-up of hot, steaming soup dumplings (Xiao Long Bao) being lifted with chopsticks, the delicate skin stretching slightly to show the broth inside. Macro lens, slow push-in movement. Warm afternoon sun shining through a window, comforting steam. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

Close-up shot of a pastry chef dusting powdered sugar onto a freshly baked raspberry tart, the sugar falling like snow onto the vibrant red berries. Smooth slow-motion tracking shot. Bright, airy bakery kitchen, daytime. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

Extreme macro of a rich espresso shot extraction, crema swirling into a beautiful golden-brown pattern inside a ceramic cup. Downward angle, slow rotational movement. Cozy cafe lighting, soft bokeh background, morning. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

A cinematic 15-20 second sequence of a master chef preparing a signature seafood dish. It starts with a wide shot of a bustling upscale open kitchen in the evening, transitioning to a dynamic zoom-in on the chef searing a giant scallop in a hot pan with leaping flames (slow-motion, 4s). Then, a smooth tracking shot follows the chef's hands delicately plating the dish with colorful edible flowers and a rich reduction sauce (6s). Finally, a super macro, slow rotating shot of the completed dish under warm, elegant spotlighting, with steam gently wafting (5s). Pacing is energetic at first, then slows down to a luxurious, poetic rhythm. No on-screen text, no logos.
【美食冷知識】你知道嗎？小籠包黃金折數是18折！這不僅是美觀，更是為了讓外皮均勻受熱，鎖住每一滴飽滿的鮮甜湯汁。下次品嚐時不妨數數看吧！
旅行的意義，有一半寫在菜單裡。透過舌尖的微距探險，我們在厚實的和牛紋理與濃郁的醬汁中，讀懂了一座城市最溫柔、最日常的煙火氣息。
【在地吃貨指南】品嚐高檔燒肉時，建議由淺入深。先從油脂較少的牛舌開始，再到油花均勻的羽下肉，最後以濃郁醬汁結尾，才能完美體驗層次感！
舌尖上的微距旅行｜用一道菜，記住一座城市的溫度。(A minimalist, high-end background of dark slate stone with a single, elegant plate of artistic food shot from above, moody lighting, subtle steam)
尋味盛夏｜喚醒味蕾的極致感官饗宴(A bright, refreshing background featuring vibrant summer fruits and mint leaves with water droplets splash, soft morning sunlight, clean aesthetic)

briefs.title: Suntravel 2026-07-22 交通移動視覺資產企劃
briefs.meta: Gemini R&D · 6 B-roll + 1 Flow + 3 內容 + 2 字卡
briefs.summary: 本套包聚焦於旅途中的「交通移動」美學，提供高質感的動態畫面與社群文案，協助創作者流暢串聯不同景點間的過渡視覺，打造具備呼吸感的旅遊故事。

items.text: A cinematic wide shot of a modern sleek high-speed train zooming through lush green countryside in Japan under a soft morning sun. Smooth panning camera tracking the train. Warm, vibrant lighting. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

A cinematic close-up from inside an airplane window, looking out at the white wing cutting through soft pink and golden clouds during a glorious sunset. Static shot with subtle natural plane vibration. Dreamy, nostalgic mood. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

A cinematic medium shot following a classic vintage scooter cruising along a winding coastal cliffside road in Italy. Golden hour lighting with sparkling sea reflections. Smooth tracking shot from behind. Breezy, adventurous mood. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

A cinematic high-angle drone shot of a white passenger ferry carving a clean wake through deep turquoise island waters. Slow push-in camera movement. Bright midday sun, sparkling water textures. Refreshing, expansive mood. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

A cinematic low-angle shot of a classic steam locomotive chugging through a dense misty pine forest in autumn. Camera is static as steam billows. Moody, mysterious atmosphere with dramatic shafts of morning light. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

A cinematic over-the-shoulder medium shot of a traveler looking out of a scenic bus window as it travels through rolling green hills. Soft, diffused overcast daylight. Slow zoom-in on the passenger's reflective expression. Contemplative, poetic mood. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

An epic 15-20 second cinematic hero sequence depicting the ultimate travel transition. It starts with a first-person POV driving a convertible car along a sunny coastal highway at sunrise, transitioning smoothly with a seamless whip-pan to the interior of a luxury glass-domed observation train winding through majestic snow-capped mountains. The mood is exhilarating and awe-inspiring, with cinematic lighting shifting from warm sunrise orange to cool alpine blue. The pacing begins fast and rhythmic, then slows down to a breathtaking, panoramic glide. No text, no logos.
旅行的意義，往往不在於抵達終點的那一刻，而是在搖晃的火車上升起車窗，迎面吹來的那陣異國微風。下一站，你想去哪裡？
試著在旅途中換乘一次當地慢車吧！避開高速鐵路的行色匆匆，用時速四十公里的溫柔視角，重新認識這座城市的日常輪廓。
買下一張靠窗的車票，就像買下一整面隨時間變幻的動態美術館。從日出到星夜，每一幀流動的風景都是旅程限定的收藏。
路上的風景，是最好的目的地｜收錄最美移動視角 (A cinematic, clean minimalist background photo of an empty highway stretching towards distant mountains under a pastel sunset sky, shallow depth of field, copy space on top)
用慢速，抵達靈魂深處｜鐵道迷的夢幻清單 (A clean flat lay photograph of a vintage train ticket next to a camera and a compass on a rustic wooden table, soft window light, plenty of copy space)

briefs.title: 奢華飯店房景精選：沉浸式旅宿空間美學
briefs.meta: Flow 每日選片 · 6 Lite + 2 Fast
briefs.summary: 本套組提供從晨光到夜幕的多角度客房空鏡，適合用於奢華旅宿開箱影片的旁白鋪墊與情境烘托。

items.text: A wide-angle establishing shot of a luxury hotel room at sunrise. The camera slowly pans across crisp white linens on a king-sized bed, illuminated by soft golden morning light filtering through sheer curtains. Elegant, warm, and serene mood. 5-8 seconds cinematic B-roll. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

Medium shot of a high-end hotel marble bathroom. The camera moves in a smooth, slow push-in towards a modern freestanding bathtub next to a floor-to-ceiling window overlooking a misty forest. Soft, diffused daylight. Luxurious and tranquil atmosphere. 5-8 seconds cinematic B-roll. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

A tracking shot moving from the interior of a chic suite out onto a private balcony. The camera captures a breathtaking view of a coastal city skyline during golden hour. Vibrant warm sunset lighting, sophisticated and aspirational mood. 5-8 seconds cinematic B-roll. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

Close-up shot of exquisite welcome amenities, including a bottle of champagne in an ice bucket and a handwritten welcome card on a rustic wooden table. Slow tilt-up showing the cozy, well-lit hotel living room in the background. Afternoon warm ambient light. 5-8 seconds cinematic B-roll. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

An extreme wide shot of a modern penthouse hotel room at night. The camera slowly dollies back, revealing the vast floor-to-ceiling glass windows that frame a sparkling metropolis at night. Moody, intimate, and premium lighting. 5-8 seconds cinematic B-roll. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

A slow tracking shot across a sleek, modern hotel minibar counter. A high-end espresso machine stands next to neatly arranged designer cups, catching the gentle morning side-light. Clean, minimalist, and upscale vibe. 5-8 seconds cinematic B-roll. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

An 8-second high-end cinematic shot. The camera follows a guest from behind in a smooth steadicam tracking movement as they enter a sunlit luxury resort suite. The guest walks towards the large balcony doors and gently draws back the sheer curtains to reveal a stunning turquoise ocean view. Bright, airy, and inviting mood with dynamic lighting transitions from shadow to brilliant sunlight. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

An 8-second premium cinematic masterpiece. The camera performs a slow, buttery focus pull from a beautifully lit designer bedside lamp to a cozy, inviting reading nook with a plush armchair and a burning fireplace in the background. Warm, amber glow of twilight. Paced with a calm, slow-motion feel that exudes peace and ultimate comfort. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

briefs.title: 追光之旅：精選「日出日落」絕美晨昏光影選片
briefs.meta: Flow 每日選片 · 6 Lite + 2 Fast
briefs.summary: 本套素材專為旅遊影片轉場與氛圍營造設計，捕捉晨曦與黃昏時段極致的光影律動，非常適合留白加入感性旁白與字幕。

items.text: Wide shot, slow pan left, warm golden light breaking through early morning clouds over a calm ocean beach. Ethereal and serene mood. Sunrise. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

Extreme wide shot, slow tilt down, deep orange and purple twilight sky casting silhouettes on jagged mountain peaks. Majestic and quiet mood. Sunset. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

Medium shot, gentle drone push forward, morning mist weaving between skyscrapers illuminated by a soft pink and amber sunrise. Modern yet tranquil mood. Early morning. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

Tracking shot moving forward along a dusty forest path, sun rays piercing through autumn leaves, creating dancing light flecks. Nostalgic and warm mood. Late afternoon sunset. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

Low angle shot, slow crane up, revealing sharp shadows on sweeping desert sand dunes during a crisp violet and gold sunrise. Minimalist and peaceful mood. Sunrise. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

Static wide shot, gentle water ripples reflecting a vibrant red and orange sunset over a still mountain lake, with distant pine trees. Reflective and meditative mood. Sunset. No on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.

Cinematic 8-second slow motion tracking shot. A solitary traveler stands on a rocky cliff edge, slowly raising a vintage camera to their eye as the sun breaches the sea horizon, casting a powerful golden glow. Dramatic lens flare, epic and inspiring mood, deliberate slow pacing. No on-screen text, no logos.

Cinematic 8-second slow drone orbit. A single colorful hot air balloon gently rises above a vast misty valley, silhouetted against a breathtaking gradient of deep crimson and orange sunset sky. Dreamy, cinematic, awe-inspiring pacing. No on-screen text, no logos.
